blended.narrative: Mont-Tremblant is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,195 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
